arts.ttl: ‘He has surprised me’: Mark Schwarzer says he’s completely changed his mind about £27m Arsenal player
arts.sum: Arsenal haven’t had the best of runs in recent weeks, dropping points in each of their last three Premier League games. However, there have been...

arts.ttl: ‘Remarkable’: Martin Keown says striker Arsenal signed for just £500k is one of the Gunners’ best ever players
arts.sum: Martin Keown has been naming who he believes are the five greatest Arsenal players of all-time. Keown played with some remarkable players at Arsenal as...

arts.ttl: Arsenal risk last-minute Andrea Berta hijack as European giants eye sporting director
arts.sum: Arsenal are understood to be on the verge of announcing Andrea Berta as their new sporting director, replacing Edu, but their could be a new spanner in the works

arts.ttl: Man Utd ruin Arsenal’s chances of signing Nico Williams
arts.sum: The report states that United are the best placed team - along with Liverpool - to sign Raphinha, who has enjoyed the best season of his career with 27 goals and 19 assists in all competitions from 41 games. However, CaughtOffside reports that Man Utd are interested in signing Barcelona winger Raphinha this summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal have looked closely at signing ‘wonderkid’ striker from Serie A club – journalist
arts.sum: Arsenal are looking to sign a new striker in the summer transfer window. Arsenal have needed a new striker for a long time now, and...

arts.ttl: Andrea Berta and Mikel Arteta agree on £60m Arsenal transfer priority as secret weapon unlocked
arts.sum: The Wolves forward was heavily linked with a switch to the Emirates Stadium in the January transfer window as Mikel Arteta looked to bolster his injury-hit frontline . According to TBR Football, Berta remains a 'huge fan' of Cunha after signing - and then selling - the forward during his time in the Spanish capital.

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Why Gunners may have better chance of beating Real Madrid than Atletico Madrid in Champions League
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts tells Sports Mole 'with a gun to his head' if he would prefer to face Real Madrid or Atletico Madrid in the Champions League semi-finals.

arts.ttl: Report: £27m Arsenal player now open to Saudi move despite being offered new contract
arts.sum: Arsenal could struggle to keep one of their most important players this summer 🚨

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal star blasts Mikel Arteta for making the 'same mistake two seasons running' and claims Gunners boss 'is not the right guy' to win the league
arts.sum: The Gunners look poised to finish as runners-up for a third consecutive season having twice fallen short in title races against Man City, with the club facing criticism for failing to strengthen in attack.

arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri on cusp of breaking Kylian Mbappe's Champions League record
arts.sum: Ethan Nwaneri is looking to break one of Kylian Mbappe's Champions League records when Arsenal face PSV.
